steps.title: Replace the denied idea
steps.content: The first sentence says metals do not maintain bonds by sharing and exchanging electrons. The next sentence gives the actual mechanism instead: freely traveling valence electrons.

steps.title: Use the correction transition
steps.content: Choice A would introduce an example, Choice C would signal a result, and Choice D would signal similarity. The remaining transition means 'instead,' which correctly replaces the denied explanation with the free-electron model. The answer is B.
